name: Kadak Mitthi
overview: When Shivangi, a much pampered daughter who has never lived outside of her house and city, moves to a metro city for a job, her mother Mayuri who initially panics finds a new found friendship with her while chatting on phone calls.

trailers.title: Kadak Mitthi | Season 01 | Episode 1 | Aarti Patel | Aarohi | Anish Shah | Oho Gujarati
